title: Economic indicators: Key statistics for the UK economy
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The UK's GDP growth rate is 0.1% in December 2025, and the unemployment rate is 4.9% in February 2026. Inflation rate is 3.3% in March 2026.
excerpt: The UK's GDP growth rate is 0.1% in December 2025, and the unemployment rate is 4.9% in February 2026. Inflation rate is 3.3% in March 2026.

content.introduction: The UK's GDP growth rate is 0.1% in December 2025, and the unemployment rate is 4.9% in February 2026. Inflation rate is 3.3% in March 2026.

House prices changed at different rates across the UK over the year to December 2025. Gross Domestic Product – Real GDP: Also known as constant price or chained volume measure, this is a measure used to indicate change in the actual quantity of goods and services produced, by adjusting for inflation.
